final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media cover image for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) creator account, featuring a DJI Pocket 4 product review in a relatable amateur style.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu native aesthetic, amateur creator vibe, casual flat-lay photography with digital text overlay, cute and playful design language
Composition: 3x3 grid layout (九宫格), centered product placement, title prominently positioned in the center
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera device, clean product shot with natural hand-holding or desk setup, approachable creator aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: minimal desk or lifestyle setting, soft neutral background with subtle props suggesting content creation
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, bright and friendly atmosphere, approachable and authentic
Color palette: clean white base, soft pastels as accents, high contrast for readability, cute and youthful tones
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: text must use cute, differentiated font style; overall design must feel authentic and non-corporate; optimized for 小红书 cover thumbnail visibility
Avoid: corporate stock photo aesthetic, generic sans-serif fonts, over-polished commercial look, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
